footer.subtitle: Ẽlɛktronik gũus-n-gese wã pag-rãmba la kambã namsg yĩnga
footer.copyright: © {{year}} MARA - Burkĩna Faso. Sor fãa bĩndi.

home.heroDesc: MARA yaa ẽlɛktronik gũus-n-gese wã pag-rãmba la kambã namsg yĩnga Burkĩna Faso pʋgẽ. Wilgi, bao-y n bãng, bao-y sõngre.
home.howHelp: MARA sẽn tõe n sõng yãmb to-to
home.howHelpDesc: Tʋʋm-teedo sẽn maan n sõng, n kõ kibay la n teel
home.featureReportDesc: Wilg namsg bũmbu tɩ ned pa bãng yãmb ye. B geta wilgr fãa neere.
home.featureChatDesc: Sõs ne sẽn sõngd-b rãmba. Yaa solg zãnga.
home.featureResourcesDesc: Seb-vẽneg, sɛba, zãmsg la kibay yãmb noyã zugu.
home.featureDirectoryDesc: Bao-y sẽn tõe n sõng-y sẽn pẽ ne yãmba: ONG, polɩɩs, logtoeemd, noyã.
home.featureProDesc: Tʋʋm-teedo tʋʋmd-n-tɩ-b la sẽn sõngd-b yĩnga.
home.tutorialsDesc: Ges-y video kãngã n bãng-y MARA tũũmd-n-yam, baa y pa mi kareng ye.
home.tutoReportDesc: Bãng-y wilgr maaneg to tik n sɛbɛn wall koe-yĩngri.
home.tutoChatDesc: Bãng-y n sõsg ne sagls soáb sull-sullũ.
home.tutoTrackDesc: Ges-y y wilgr yellã ne y nimɛro la wã manegr sẽn wilgda.
